title: andrographis stenophylla
intro: Andrographis stenophylla is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to the Himalayan region and Southeast Asia, and is also known as Himalayan horse gentian. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andrographis stenophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and support the immune system. Andrographis stenophylla is typically consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a capsule or tea, or used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
